catalog_content:
Item Name: BAKELL Peacock Green Art & Craft Glitter, 5g Jar | DAZZLER DUST | Non-Toxic Decorating Glitter | Arts, Crafts, Slime, Glue, Paint, Face & Body (Peacock Green) Bullet Point 1: Bakell Dazzler Dust Non Toxic 5g Jar Sparkle Decorating Glitter From Bakell Bullet Point 2: Search "Bakell" on Amazon for more decorating dusts, crafting, baking and cake decorating products Bullet Point 3: *Note: Dazzler Dusts are only non toxic decorating sparkle dusts, our luster, tinker dusts and petal dusts are the food grade edible dusts. Product Description:

We offer a huge variety of Disco, Hologram, Luster, Jewel, Pearl, Petal & Highlighter Dusts we have a color and variety for all of your baking, latte or even crafting needs! Dusts can be brushed on dry, mixed with solvent, painted or sprinkled depending on your desired look, see below for additional details on our different types of edible and non toxic decorating dusts.

Understanding the different types of dusts

Jewel Dusts (Food Grade) - Are a very potent and shiny edible dust, very similar to Disco dusts, but with a slightly silkier texture!

Luster Dusts (Food Grade) - Are a much finer powder but still very shiny with brilliant pearlizer tones in each color shade!

Disco & Hologram Dusts (Non Toxic) - Are very shiny, glittery, non toxic decorating dusts! *Note: almost all of our dusts are edible food grade, however disco & hologram dusts are only considered non toxic.

Petal Dusts (Food Grade) - Are brilliant colored and very fine powder dusts, with less pearlizer and more solid colors, these are absolutely lovely for projects such as edible flower decorating!

Highlighter Dusts (Non Toxic) - Deep toned pearl dusts, very similar to luster dusts! *Note: almost all of our dusts are edible food grade, however highlighter dusts are only considered non toxic.

Bakell constantly strives to offer the absolute best in quality, superior customer service and the lowest prices online!

Value: nan Unit: None
overall_summary: Decorative hologram glitter for arts and crafts, positioned as a non-toxic, non-edible product. Standard 5g jar packaging with no premium indicators or certifications. Pricing likely driven by material cost, brand positioning, and craft market demand.
